title: A Message from Hung King
content: My dear grandchild, it warms my heart to see you diligently learning about our Dragon and Fairy origins. Always remember that we are all brothers and sisters of one house, sharing the same Lac Hong bloodline. Live with love and protect one another!

title: A Message from the Trung Sisters
content: Did you know? Patriotism knows no age or gender. We are very proud to see you understand the indomitable will of Vietnamese women. Always be brave in protecting what is right and cherish your motherland.

title: A Message from Ngo Quyen
content: Congratulations on passing the challenge on the Bach Dang River! Intelligence and thorough preparation are the keys to every victory. Study hard so that in the future, you can contribute your wisdom to building a powerful Vietnam.

title: A Message from Ly Thai To
content: The thousand-year civilization of Thang Long - Hanoi is thanks to the long-term vision of our ancestors. I hope you always have grand dreams and never stop striving to turn those dreams into reality, just as I chose the land of the Rising Dragon as the capital.

title: A Message from Tran Hung Dao
content: The Dong A spirit is the power of solidarity. When millions of people act as one, no enemy can defeat us. Join hands with your friends, progress together, and be worthy descendants of the resilient Tran family!

title: A Message from Quang Trung
content: Speed and decisiveness! That is how I protected our borders. The same applies to your studies: you need high focus and determination. Never back down before difficult problems or new knowledge. Move forward, my child!

title: A Message from Uncle Ho
content: Whether the mountains and rivers of Vietnam become beautiful, whether the Vietnamese nation steps onto the stage of glory to stand side by side with the powers of the five continents, depends largely on your diligence in study. I believe you can do it!
